title: DLL Side-Loading from Suspicious Directory
description: Detects execution of legitimate signed binaries from temp or user-writable directories, suggesting DLL side-loading.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*.exe' and ('Process Name' like '*\\Temp\\*' or 'Process Name' like '*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*' or 'Process Name' like '*\\Downloads\\*' or 'Process Name' like '*\\Desktop\\*')) and not (('Process Name' like '*\\Windows\\Temp\\setup*' or 'Process Name' like '*\\Microsoft\\*')))
